hero.title: Create a Professional Resume in Minutes
hero.subtitle: Free, open-source resume builder

features.title: All-in-one Resume Builder
features.subtitle: Packed with powerful features to help you create a professional resume and win interview opportunities

parser.title: Resume Parsing
parser.description: We can parse your PDF resume, making it easier to create and edit your resume content (feature coming soon)

templates.title: Multiple Templates
templates.description: Offering various professionally designed templates to meet different industry standards and job application requirements

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Works smoothly on any device, from mobile phones to tablets and desktop computers, with optimized interface

security.title: Local Data Security
security.description: Your resume data is stored entirely in your local browser and is never uploaded to external servers, ensuring complete privacy

export.title: Quick Export
export.description: Export professional high-quality PDF files with just one click, ready to submit your job application anytime

ats.title: ATS-Friendly Format
ats.description: Optimize resume structure and formatting to ensure Applicant Tracking Systems can correctly parse all your information

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Frequently encountered issues about ResumeToJob on GitHub

garbledText.question: Why is my exported resume showing garbled characters?
garbledText.answer: This is usually because you haven't selected the correct font or the fonts haven't loaded properly due to slow network speeds. Please ensure the fonts have loaded completely before exporting your resume.

chineseFonts.question: Why don't I see Chinese fonts in the font options?
chineseFonts.answer: Because Chinese fonts are large, ResumeToJob checks your browser language settings. If your browser language does not include Chinese, Chinese fonts will not be loaded.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your Resume?
cta.subtitle: Easily create, edit and download beautiful professional resumes to improve your job application success rate

bugReport.title: Bug Report
bugReport.message:
If you find bugs or things you think are not good, please report issues in GitHub Issues.

Click OK to jump to the GitHub Issues page.

resetDefault.title: Reset Default
resetDefault.message:
Are you sure you want to reset to default? This will delete all information, please make a backup.

Click OK to clear all data and refresh the page.

banner.message: Resume data is stored in browser locally. To prevent accidental loss, it is recommended to use the [manage resumes] function to export and save.

editorInstructions.title: Editor Instructions
editorInstructions.unorderedList: Type '- ' or '* ' to create an unordered list (note the space after)
editorInstructions.orderedList: Type '1. ' to create an ordered list (note the space after)
editorInstructions.boldText: Type '**text**' or '__text__' to make text bold
editorInstructions.autoList: When you press Enter at the end of a list item, a new list item is automatically created. Press Enter again to cancel the auto-list.
editorInstructions.hyperlink: Hyperlinks are supported in your resume. Use one of the following methods:
editorInstructions.hyperlinkMethod1: Wrap URLs with English parentheses (not Chinese parentheses)
editorInstructions.hint: These shortcuts help you format your resume content more efficiently.
editorInstructions.resumeManagementDesc: Support for creating, switching, cloning, and importing/exporting multiple resumes

resumeManager.title: Resume Manager
resumeManager.noResumes: No resumes yet. Create your first resume!
resumeManager.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this resume? This action cannot be undone.
resumeManager.confirmDeleteMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete the resume "{title}"?

This action cannot be undone and all related data will be permanently deleted.
resumeManager.importError: Import failed, please check file format
